overall.description: A nighttime walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring wet streets reflecting neon lights, futuristic vehicles, and pedestrians. The camera moves along sidewalks and crosses an intersection in a high-density urban environment with holographic advertisements and modern glass architecture.

multiple vehicles pass by with motion blur and light trails

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to a busy street with neon-lit buildings

entered.detail: tall futuristic glass building with illuminated windows rising on the left side
rain-slicked pavement reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings
tall palm tree trunk visible against the city lights
modern street lamp with horizontal LED bars illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet futuristic city street at night, with the camera walking forward along a concrete sidewalk. Glass skyscrapers rise on the left while futuristic vehicles pass by on the right, their lights creating motion trails on the rain-slicked pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under building overhang with concrete benches

pedestrian with glowing green umbrella passes by heading in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking under the building overhang, passing concrete benches and a pedestrian with a glowing green umbrella

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera while holding a glowing green umbrella

entered.detail: dark covered walkway with linear ceiling lights and DELLAMAK signage
rectangular concrete structures with glowing blue accent lighting
illuminated building signage reading DELLAMAK on the dark facade

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered walkway beneath a building overhang, transitioning from the open street to a sheltered pedestrian area with concrete benches. A notable pedestrian carrying a glowing green umbrella passes by in the opposite direction, and the DELLAMAK building signage becomes visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian zone with digital advertisement pillars and holographic billboards

events.description: passing digital advertisement kiosk displaying TOUGH MORNING poster
navigating around pedestrians seated on benches near advertisement displays

bright blue holographic display advertising breakfast items with vibrant colors
low concrete benches where pedestrians are sitting and resting

segments.scene_description: Walking through a pedestrian zone filled with digital advertisement pillars and holographic billboards, including one displaying TOUGH MORNING. Several pedestrians are seated on concrete benches along the right side, and the area maintains a covered, neon-lit atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: approaching open intersection with visible crosswalk markings
crossing the street at the crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection and crossing the street alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking alongside the camera toward the crosswalk

entered.detail: yellow painted crosswalk lines on the wet asphalt surface
tall traffic signal pole with illuminated signs at the street corner
modern building facade with large glass entrance across the street

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered area and approaches an open urban intersection, navigating toward the crosswalk. The scene opens up to show wider street views with crosswalk markings, traffic signals, and other pedestrians crossing the wet asphalt together.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked city street into a sheltered pedestrian corridor before emerging into a wide urban intersection. It begins by walking along a concrete sidewalk flanked by towering glass skyscrapers, where the lights of passing futuristic vehicles create vibrant trails on the wet pavement. As the camera moves forward, it transitions from the open street into a covered walkway beneath a building overhang, passing a pedestrian with a glowing green umbrella and the signage of the DELLAMAK building. The scene then shifts through a neon-lit pedestrian zone filled with digital advertisement pillars and holographic billboards, including one for TOUGH MORNING, while people rest on concrete benches. Finally, the camera exits the sheltered area and opens up toward a bustling intersection, navigating across the wet asphalt and crosswalk markings amidst other pedestrians and traffic signals.
